scripts.deploy:miniapp:staging: npm --workspace @growthbot/miniapp run build && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/miniapp/dist --project-name=growthbot-miniapp --branch=staging
scripts.deploy:admin:staging: npm --workspace @growthbot/admin run build && npx wrangler pages deploy apps/admin/dist --project-name=growthbot-admin --branch=staging
scripts.deploy:pages:staging: npm run deploy:miniapp:staging && npm run deploy:admin:staging
